# Feature Request

## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement clearly.

```text
Example:
Add a GitHub Actions workflow to validate Terraform formatting in the kp-terraform-infra repository.
```

[ ] kubernetes-platform

## Acceptance Criteria

This feature is complete when:

```text
[ ] The feature has a clear purpose.
[ ] The required files are created or updated.
[ ] Documentation is included.
[ ] The folder structure follows project standards.
[ ] No secrets are committed.
[ ] No deployment is performed during the design phase.
[ ] Security impact is considered.
[ ] Rollback or recovery notes are included where needed.
[ ] The feature supports the GitHub-first project strategy.
```
